name: AURUM SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under AURUM SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Monthly Tata CLiQ Fashion voucher worth Rs 1,500 on monthly spends of Rs 1 lakh
Tata CLiQ Luxury voucher worth Rs 5,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Taj experience voucher worth Rs 10,000 on annual spends of Rs 10 lakh
Apple voucher worth Rs 20,000 on annual spends of Rs 20 lakh
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 12 lakh or more in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: 40,000 AURUM Reward Points worth Rs 10,000 as activation benefit, subject to product terms
4 AURUM Reward Points per Rs 100 on eligible spends
1 AURUM Reward Point equals Rs 0.25 for statement credit redemption
Transfer partners include select airline, hotel and loyalty partners as per AURUM programme terms
Unlimited complimentary international lounge access with DreamFolks membership
16 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 4 per quarter
4 complimentary movie tickets per month via BookMyShow, capped at Rs 1,000 per month
16 complimentary golf rounds and 12 golf lessons per year, subject to availability and programme terms
1 complimentary airport spa session per quarter at select airports
Complimentary premium memberships and subscriptions may include Club Marriott, Wall Street Journal, Mint and IPV membership in the first year, subject to current offer terms
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per month
